steps: The table gives two data points: (1, 140) and (3, 250). Compute slope: m = \frac{250 - 140}{3 - 1} = \frac{110}{2} = 55.
Substitute into f(h) = mh + b with point (1, 140): 140 = 55(1) + b → b = 85.
The equation is f(h) = 55h + 85. That matches choice B — B is correct.
Verify with the second point: f(3) = 55(3) + 85 = 165 + 85 = 250. Correct.

choices.explanation: • f(1) = 85 + 55 = 140 ✓, but f(3) = 255 + 55 = 310 ≠ 250. Does not fit both points. Eliminate A.
• f(1) = 55 + 85 = 140 ✓ and f(3) = 165 + 85 = 250 ✓. Both data points satisfied. That matches choice B — B is correct.
